summary: Iteration 65: Bulletproof Offline Sales Features - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend delta sync and idempotent sync endpoints verified. Frontend POS page loads correctly with all offline-related features implemented.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1x-1) - minor styling issue on initial render

BACKEND_DELTA_SYNC.GET_pos_data_full_sync: PASS - Returns is_delta=false when no last_sync param
BACKEND_DELTA_SYNC.GET_pos_data_delta_sync: PASS - Returns is_delta=true when last_sync param provided
BACKEND_DELTA_SYNC.GET_pos_data_with_branch: PASS - Returns branch-specific inventory and prices
BACKEND_DELTA_SYNC.delta_filters_by_timestamp: PASS - Products filtered by updated_at/created_at >= last_sync

BACKEND_IDEMPOTENT_SYNC.POST_sales_sync_with_envelope_id: PASS - Processes sales with envelope_id for idempotency
BACKEND_IDEMPOTENT_SYNC.POST_sales_sync_duplicate_detection: PASS - Returns status='duplicate' for same envelope_id
BACKEND_IDEMPOTENT_SYNC.envelope_id_stored_in_invoice: PASS - Invoice document includes envelope_id field

BACKEND_SYNC_ESTIMATE.GET_sync_estimate: PASS - Returns product/customer counts and estimated KB

FRONTEND_OFFLINE_DB.setOfflineOrg_function: PASS - Implemented in offlineDB.js, scopes DB by org_id
FRONTEND_OFFLINE_DB.deductLocalInventory_function: PASS - Updates both inventory and products stores
FRONTEND_OFFLINE_DB.hasPendingSales_function: PASS - Returns boolean for pending sales check
FRONTEND_OFFLINE_DB.putProduct_function: PASS - Implemented for delta sync merge

FRONTEND_POS_PAGE.deductLocalInventory_calls: PASS - Called after checkout in all paths (online/offline/fallback)
FRONTEND_POS_PAGE.beforeunload_warning: PASS - Event listener registered with hasPendingSales check
FRONTEND_POS_PAGE.online_offline_indicator: PASS - Shows 'Online' status with green indicator

FRONTEND_SYNC_MANAGER.is_delta_handling: PASS - putProduct used for delta, cacheProducts for full

critical_code_review_comments: Delta sync correctly filters products by updated_at OR created_at >= last_sync timestamp
Envelope ID pattern correctly implements idempotent sync - duplicates detected by both id and envelope_id
Org-scoped IndexedDB prevents cross-tenant data leaks via agripos_offline_{org_id} naming
deductLocalInventory correctly updates both inventory and products stores for accurate stock display
beforeunload warning properly checks hasPendingSales() before allowing page close
syncManager correctly distinguishes delta sync (putProduct merge) vs full sync (cacheProducts replace)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements and code paths verified)

seed_data_creation: Test offline sync created test invoices prefixed with 'TEST-OFFLINE' (not auto-deleted for audit)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 65 verified Bulletproof Offline Sales features. Key implementations: (1) Delta sync via last_sync param on GET /sync/pos-data returns is_delta=true and filters products by timestamp, (2) Idempotent sync via envelope_id prevents duplicate sales processing, (3) Org-scoped IndexedDB uses agripos_offline_{org_id} pattern, (4) deductLocalInventory updates both inventory and products stores for accurate offline stock levels, (5) beforeunload warning checks hasPendingSales() before allowing page close. All backend and frontend tests passed. No mocked APIs.
